description: Round moon, round hearts — together, no matter how far. Bunny King (BUNY) is the FIRST rabbit memecoin launched on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — leaping from the moon to bring fluff, fun, and lunar legend to everyone. Happy to take you “to the moon,” BUNY is fully on-chain, rug-proof, and crowned with joy — spreading meme-powered happiness across the BunnyVerse at light-speed in Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Bunny King
